news.t: How To Go Long AND Short Consumer Stocks Using AI
It’s hard for shoppers to avoid Amazon — even in their ETFs

holdings.infoBox: RXI is an equity ETF with a total of 160 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 14.73%, Tesla at 7.09%, The Home Depot at 4.42%, Alibaba Group Holding at 3.81%, and Toyota Motor at 3.31%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Consumer Discretionary ETF (RXI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap global consumer discretionary stocks as determined by S&P/GICS. RXI was launched on Sep 12, 2006 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: It’s hard for shoppers to avoid Amazon — even in their ETFs
data.text: Amazon.com Inc. makes up an outsize share of the biggest consumer discretionary ETFs, a fact investors should keep in mind when researching such a trade.
